body:
This is the simplest coupler test case that can be used for quick prototyping without interface wrappers. This PR updates the test case for the recent upstream (i.e. ClimaCore) changes, and sets up the run file as a tutorial. Once this is merged, it will be set up for automatic CI. 

TODO
- [x] setup Documenter (tutorial's [index.html](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1udu8zhlTlUnd86wvaMuBCKbF1sKxLCjJ/view?usp=sharing))
- [x] setup auto-CI (Buildkite will be hooked up in a separate PR after renaming the repo)
title: Test case 1 update + conversion to tutorial
